edit_summary: Added AC-032/TEST-032 (path-traversal negative case: out-of-root Outputs row rejected fail-closed, sentinel never read, no digest) operationalizing Security Boundary B1, and amended AC-014/TEST-014 to mandate reuse of the existing containment discipline (path resolution + containment check before any read) alongside the table-parser shape. Header range updated to TEST-001..032. No other REQ/AC/TEST changed.
